description.LOCATION_EN: Island Line and Island Line Service Disruption
description.LOCATION_CN: 港島綫及港島綫服務延誤

2024-11-12T11:54:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that there is an additional travelling time of 8 to 10 minutes on the Island Line between Kennedy Town and Chai Wan because of a technical fault on a train at Kennedy Town Station.
2024-11-12T11:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，由於堅尼地城站有列車機件故障，港島綫來往堅尼地城至柴灣的車程延長8至10分鐘。

2024-11-12T12:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to an equipment fault on a train at Kennedy Town Station, the total journey time on the Island Line between Kennedy Town Station and Chai Wan Station could be extended by 15-20 minutes. Longer waiting times on Island Line platforms can be expected.
2024-11-12T12:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於有列車在堅尼地城站出現設備故障，港島綫來往堅尼地城站及柴灣站的行車時間預計需要額外15-20分鐘。 現時港島綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。

2024-11-12T12:24:00.CONTENT_EN: The Island Line train which could not be operated at Kennedy Town Station has been moved away from the mainline. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
2024-11-12T12:24:00.CONTENT_CN: 在堅尼地城站出現故障的列車已駛離行車綫，港島綫列車服務逐步回復正常。
